style_effects: Flickering translucent violet aura with slow, drifting mist particles that twist like smoke, casting distorted reflections in the air. Cold blue-white ghost luminescence pulses faintly through its translucent body, casting elongated, bending shadows that ripple unnaturally. The lighting mood is eerie and still, with a soft glow that makes the mist seem to float in midair. Clean cel-shaded Pokémon illustration style with bold outlines and soft shading.
